name: NEUTRA CORP.
business: Neutra Corp. sells hemp-derived products, including CBD, delta-8-THC, and other cannabinoids, to consumers. The company also plans to research and bring new technology to the nutraceutical space and intends to participate in the medical cannabis market. Manufacturing is entrusted to a nutraceutical contractor for private labeling.

exposures.sentence: Neutra primarily sells hemp-derived products, including products containing delta-8-THC and other cannabinoids.
